'''wangufu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nobleman|nobleman]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-ng-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nobleman|nobleman]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| wangufu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:wængifith|wængifith]] || [[word:wængifij|wængifij]] || [[word:wængifish|wængifish]] || [[word:wængifi|wængifi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:wangungufuth|wangungufuth]] || [[word:wangungufuj|wangungufuj]] || [[word:wangungufush|wangungufush]] || [[word:wangungufu|wangungufu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:wangufuth|wangufuth]] || [[word:wangufuj|wangufuj]] || [[word:wangufush|wangufush]] || [[word:wangufu|wangufu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:wanguffuth|wanguffuth]] || [[word:wanguffuj|wanguffuj]] || [[word:wanguffush|wanguffush]] || [[word:wanguffuf|wanguffuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:wangufuthu|wangufuthu]] || [[word:wangufuju|wangufuju]] || [[word:wangufushu|wangufushu]] || [[word:wangufuku|wangufuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:wangufuth|wangufuth]] || [[word:wangufuj|wangufuj]] || [[word:wangufush|wangufush]] || [[word:wangufu|wangufu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:wangufuthul|wangufuthul]] || [[word:wangufujul|wangufujul]] || [[word:wangufushul|wangufushul]] || [[word:wangufukul|wangufukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:wangufuthuthu|wangufuthuthu]] || [[word:wangufujuju|wangufujuju]] || [[word:wangufushushu|wangufushushu]] || [[word:wangufuku|wangufuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:wangufuthun|wangufuthun]] || [[word:wangufujun|wangufujun]] || [[word:wangufushun|wangufushun]] || [[word:wangufukun|wangufukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:wangufuthuoro|wangufuthuoro]] || [[word:wangufujuoro|wangufujuoro]] || [[word:wangufushuoro|wangufushuoro]] || [[word:wangufukuoro|wangufukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
